Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-07-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel First Supplemental Interrogatory & First Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And Things; And Request For Sanctionss
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion To Compel First Supplemental Interrogatory & First Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And Things; And Request For Sanctions:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FIRST SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORY AND FIRST REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WAS NOT OPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT WITHOUT OBJECTION, FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORY.
(2) WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEEFENDANT WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, INCLUDING DELIVERY OF COPIES OF THE DOCUMENTS THEMSELVES.
(3) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.OO PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT AND ITS ATTORNEY WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Things
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GREGORY C. CATTERMOLE, Esq. of Law Office of Gregory C. Cattermole (Tel: 650-345-6811) for plaintiff Milica Tomasevich;
Atty. MICHAEL SPALDING, Esq. of Hedani, Choy, Spalding & Salvagione (Tel: 415-892-4848) for defendant San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit District.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion To Compel Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Things.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's Motion to Compel Form Interrogatories and Request for Production of Documents and Things is GRANTED. Plaintiff Milica Tomasevich is ORDERED to provide and serve on Defendant's counsel complete, verified responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories and non-privileged documents responsive to Defendant's Request for Production of Documents on or before August 5, 2021.

Defense counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.VanZandt@lewisbrisbois.com (cc'ing opposing counsel).

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
